details.text: Review the extension type for ext-derived: extensions should not have a context of Element unless it's really intended that they can be used anywhere

Value is 'http://hl7.org/fhir/test/StructureDefinition/ext-derived' but is fixed to 'http://hl7.org/fhir/test/StructureDefinition/ext-base' in the profile , because the value must match the fixed value define in 'http://hl7.org/fhir/test/StructureDefinition/ext-base'
